title: First Solar (FSLR) Q1 Earnings Preview
text: First Solar is set to report Q1 earnings Thursday after market close. Analysts anticipate revenue growth of 21.9% year-over-year, a significant improvement from the 6.4% increase in the same quarter last year. The company beat analysts' revenue expectations last quarter, reporting revenues of $1.68 billion, up 11.1% annually. However, full-year guidance disappointed, missing expectations for both revenue and EBITDA. Most analysts have reconfirmed their estimates recently, though First Solar has missed Wall Street's revenue estimates multiple times over the last two years. The average analyst price target stands at $245.07, compared to the current stock price of $196.26. The electrical equipment sector shows positive momentum, with peer companies reporting mixed results. Bloom Energy delivered exceptional 130% revenue growth while Enphase Energy reported a 20.6% decline. The broader segment is up 14.1% over the past month, while FSLR gained 6.3% during the same period.
